feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Do I Wanna Know?
entry.summary:
Author: Deluv_011

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 76,972Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 503

Summary: Damian Wayne and Conner Kent form an unexpected couple. However, few knew that behind that façade, each of them had their heart burning for someone else. Thus, Damian and Conner cling to each other as a distorted reflection of what they truly long for. Damian yearns for Jon Kent. Conner pines for Tim Drake. And the deeper they fall into that strange relationship, the more they begin to notice certain glances among their teammates… glances that reveal far more than mere friendship.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Worst First (Impression)
entry.summary:
Author: i8thecookie

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 57,317Chapters: 18/20Kudos: 310

Summary: Years ago, in Smallville, Bruce made an impression on Clark. And not a good one. Now Bruce is back in his life—charming, relentless, and completely unaware of the damage he left behind all those years ago. But Clark hasn't forgotten. And while Batman and Superman learn how to trust each other, their civilian identities are busy getting everything wrong.

entry.title: Boundaries and ways not to cross them
entry.summary:
Author: morallywrong

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,036Chapters: 4/8Kudos: 177

Summary: Bruce had known all day what was coming at him. Like watching a car crash in slow motion, he was unable to do anything about the situation.---Bruce was a man of many faces and he took care of whom he showed which side of himself. When the Justice League gives him the ultimatum to reveal himself or leave the League, he leaves. If only Superman, the man he loved, had shown him support... Instead, the other hero couldn't even look him in the eye.

entry.title: Undisclosed Desires
entry.summary:
Author: lmaosobsquietly

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,178Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Clark Kent has a habit of seeing the good in people. It’s what makes him a great reporter—and what makes Bruce Wayne a problem. Bruce doesn’t make sense. Not as a careless billionaire, not as the man Clark meets in quieter moments, and certainly not as the person Clark finds himself thinking about long after their conversations end. Bruce Wayne didn't plan on falling for a journalist with too many questions, and a smile that sees right through him. Bruce knows exactly why Clark is confused. He knows Clark is getting close to something he shouldn’t see, asking questions that don’t have safe answers. It’s a dangerous kind of attention—one Bruce should shut down immediately. Instead, he lets Clark in. Slowly. Carefully. Too much. As their connection deepens into something softer, something undeniable, the truth looms between them. Because Clark doesn’t know who Bruce really is. And Bruce is starting to realize he doesn’t want to keep pretending he doesn’t care.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Losing Touch, Gaining His
entry.summary:
Author: averyhatake

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,789Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 17

Summary: A universe where Batman and Superman despite all their time of knowing each other and working together still have yet to reveal their identities. Finally the two first meet as civilians and the ball begins rolling. The two find themselves faltering both as hero's and as people, but will find themselves within one another again.

entry.title: Second time is the charm
entry.summary:
Author: Emelian65

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,748Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 317

Summary: Clark wakes up in his bed, feeling strange. He had vivid dreams of a cataclysmic future. He sits up, tries to shake it off, but the memories are too detailed, overwhelming. He remembers the world ending, heroes falling, his own death? But then he's alive, young. He checks the date... It's now 2011, several years in the past.

entry.summary:
Author: Ferox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 84,246Chapters: 16/19Kudos: 1,059

entry.title: We Could Be Heroes - A SuperBat Love Story
entry.summary:
Author: xxEmilee_Lunaxx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 131,592Chapters: 45/?Kudos: 419

Summary: "I’ve made a lot of mistakes in my life, and for a long time, I thought I’d continue to fall into darkness. But Clark is like a shining light. He inspires me to be a better person.” Bruce Wayne and Clark Kent both maintain a strong sense of justice and fight for peace in their respective cities. However, both are struggling to maintain order alone, and are weighed down by a lost sense of identity and the loneliness that stems from the isolation of living a double life. After a chance encounter, the pair agree to form a Justice League to address the growing threat to Earth's security. As they learn to work together, new feelings blossom, and the heroes soon find themselves leaning on each other for support and comfort. Slow-burn romance. Bat-family drama. Justice League shenanigans. Bruce being a rich kid with issues. Superman being an innocent lad. Your favorite black cat/golden retriever boys are in for a wild ride.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The beat of your heart (And the beat of my wings)
entry.summary:
Author: Hubcap_Stealer_YumYum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,537Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 35

Summary: Who knows? Maybe he’d even earn brownie points with the Batman for being able to take care of his precious city quickly.·˖✶𓆩🦇𓆪✶˖·˳.He wanted the Alien out of his city and he wanted him out NOW. Bruce Wayne, also known as the batman, watched over his city from above and violently repelled any intruders. That is, until a man with a blinding smile who can fly just as high as he can shows up, and a little boy who watched his parents die shortly after. TLDR: Bruce has bat wings and they attract the empathetic Kal'El, who helps him be a better person and father.

entry.title: Forever and evermore (For Eternity)
entry.summary:
Author: starfishingbythehill

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,911Chapters: 9/9Kudos: 26

Summary: “Come on Clark, it isn’t even that scary!” Clark’s face reminds him of the statue in his mother’s garden, the one over the fountain. The scrunched nose, the distant eyes, the thin lips. Displeasure and acceptance both. He really doesn’t understand what’s wrong. “We climb higher in the barn.” “It isn’t the same thing !” Clark denies. “I can’t do it Bruce, I’m not allowed to. It would make Ma sad.” “You’re such a wuss.” Bruce rolls his eyes and jumps down the tree. Clark pouts, crossing his arms in front of himself. Bruce rolls his eyes harder. Clark never breaks the rules and he never seems happy about it. Anyway, he won’t even stay mad for long, they’re best friends so it’s okay. “Let’s go see the horses. Tommy is teaching me how to ride.” Clark smiles at him then. See? What did he say, it’s okay. They can’t stay mad at each other for long because they can’t stay away from each other for long. They are best friends after all.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
